prompt: Parse the AXI DMA spec and give me a structured DV summary. Spec file: axi_dma_spec.md. Project: axi_dma.

assertions.text: dv_spec_summary.md and dv_spec_summary.json are both created
Both clock domains (aclk and pclk) captured
assertions.evidence: Both clock domains captured with min/max frequency as numeric fields

assertions.text: Both interfaces (AXI4 Master and APB Slave) listed with signals
Known constraints include word-alignment and single-outstanding-transaction
JSON is valid and matches defined schema structure
assertions.evidence: Baseline added custom dv_notes object with structured DV analysis; while useful, schema diverges from the standard downstream-compatible schema defined in the skill
